title: anigozanthos humilis subsp. chrysanthus
intro: Anigozanthos humilis subsp. chrysanthus, commonly known as Kangaroo Paw, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the Haemodoraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anigozanthos humilis subsp. chrysanthus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes can be dried and used as a powder or made into a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
